title: Microsynapse
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''microsynapse''' was presumably a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] component, though it is unknown what purpose it might have served.

Ca. [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]], following a battle between [[Kugg]]'s [[Destroyer (droid)|Destroyer]] and a [[Ranger X-1]] on [[Dodz]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] suffered some damage to his microsynapse, which required repairs impossible to perform there, leading the droid and his [[C-3PO/Legends|counterpart]] to leave Dodz.

==Appearances==
*[[Droids (1986) 1|''Droids'' (1986) 1]]
